layers.name: CLI
layers.purpose: Run the local Agent loop directly.

layers.name: MCP
layers.purpose: Expose the Agent loop as standard tools.

layers.name: Skill
layers.purpose: Document the reusable AFSIM Agent workflow.

layers.name: Orchestration
layers.purpose: Run environment checks, MCP, Agent, AFSIM, and audit outputs.

layers.name: EventEvidence
layers.purpose: Parse AFSIM .evt output and verify mission-effect evidence.

layers.name: Experiments
layers.purpose: Run controlled AFSIM parameter sweeps with explicit random seeds.

layers.name: QualityGate
layers.purpose: Run model-independent core checks and production acceptance checks.

quality_gates: production runs do not use rules fallback
AFSIM event evidence profile passed is true
reproducible experiment quality gate passed is true
core project quality gate passed is true
